family-style-taco-lasagna.name: Family-style Taco Lasagna

ingredients.prep: cilantro, green onions or chives, guacamole, sliced jalapeños, pico de gallo

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Grease a 9 x 13-inch glass or ceramic baking dish.

Heat the oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the beef, and cook, stirring often, until browned, 7–8 minutes. Drain the drippings. Add the onion to the skillet, and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3–4 minutes, until softened. Add the garlic and bell pepper, and cook, stirring often, until softened, 1–2 minutes.  Stir in the beans, salsa, taco seasoning, cumin, chili powder, and salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 2–3 minutes, until well mixed. Remove from heat. Add more salt to taste.

Layer 6 tortilla halves, half of the beef mixture, half of the tomatoes, and one-third of the cheese in the baking dish. Repeat layers with the remaining tortillas, beef mixture, tomatoes, and cheese on top.
Cover with foil, and bake for 10 minutes. Uncover and bake for 10 more minutes, until the cheese is bubbly.
Let rest for 10 minutes, then slice. Top with sour cream, cilantro, green onions, guacamole, jalapeños, and pico de gallo.
Enjoy!

fast-and-zucchini-soup.name: Fast And Zucchini Soup
instructions: Stir water, zucchini, and bouillon cubes together in a stockpot; bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium, then cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until zucchini is tender, about 20 minutes.
Carefully drop cream cheese into the stockpot.
Cook and stir until melted, about 5 minutes.
Blend soup with an immersion blender until smooth.

fava-bean-bruschetta-with-chicory-and-re.name: Fava Bean Bruschetta With Chicory And Red Onion

ingredients.item: Aleppo-style pepper or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a small pot over medium. Cook yellow onion, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic, rosemary, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until fragrant and garlic is soft, about 3 minutes. Add fava beans and pour in cold water to cover by 2". Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, season with salt, and simmer until tender, 45–60 minutes. Let cool slightly. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.

Purée fava beans in a blender with ¼ cup reserved cooking liquid and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt, oil, and lemon juice as needed.
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Add red onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until brown but not soft, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Wipe skillet clean and heat 1 Tbsp. oil over medium-high. Add chicory, season with salt, and cook, tossing, until wilted slightly, about 3 minutes.
Spoon fava bean purée onto toast; top with red onion, chicory, and Aleppo-style pepper. Drizzle with oil.
Do Ahead: Fava beans can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

fennel-and-celery-root-salad.name: Fennel And Celery Root Salad

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced on a mandoline, plus  0.25 cup coarsely chopped fennel fronds
peeled, very thinly sliced on a mandoline

ingredients.item: Head of treviso or chioggia radicchio

instructions: Toss sliced fennel, fennel fronds, celery root, radicchio, celery leaves, parsley, and marjoram in a large bowl to combine; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with oil and lemon juice and toss to coat; taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Pile salad lightly onto plates.

feta-spinach-stuffed-salmon.name: Feta-spinach Stuffed Salmon

ingredients.prep: white and green parts, thinly sliced

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a large baking dish with cooking spray.
Combine cream cheese, feta cheese, spinach, and scallions in a small bowl until well blended.

Cut salmon into two equal pieces. Brush top of one piece with oil. Place oiled-side down, into the prepared baking dish. Spread cream cheese filling evenly over top. Place remaining piece of salmon on top of filling and brush top with oil.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish flakes easily with a fork, 20 to 30 minutes. Cooking time will depend on the size and weight of salmon. Begin checking doneness after 20 minutes.
Slice into two pieces to serve.

fettuccine-with-crab.name: Fettuccine With Crab

ingredients.item: Fresh or dried fettuccine or tagliatelle
Piment d’espelette or aleppo-style pepper or  0.25 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat oil and butter in a medium skillet over medium. Cook shallot and garlic, stirring often, until soft and golden, about 4 minutes. Add in crème fraîche and cook until mixture is slightly thickened, about 3 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes (for fresh pasta). Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta cooking liquid.

Using tongs, transfer pasta to skillet with sauce and add crabmeat. Finely grate zest from lemon over pasta and squeeze in about 1 tsp. juice. Cook pasta, tossing constantly and thinning sauce with a few tablespoonfuls of pasta cooking liquid if needed, until pasta is glossy and sauce is the consistency of heavy cream, about 3 minutes. Add tarragon, season with salt, and toss a few more times to wilt tarragon.
Transfer pasta to a platter and sprinkle with piment d’Espelette.

fiesta-bean-salsa.name: Fiesta Bean Salsa
instructions: Mix black beans, garbanzo beans, corn, tomatoes, bell pepper, salsa, cilantro, lime juice, jalapeno pepper, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, cumin, and onion powder together in a bowl.
Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.

fig-and-walnut-bostock.name: Fig And Walnut Bostock
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until fragrant, 8–10 minutes; let cool. Pulse in a food processor until finely ground.
Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter and honey until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Mix in egg, then flour, baking powder, salt, and walnuts just to blend.
DO AHEAD: Walnut crème can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 350°. Whisk eggs and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl and brush 1 side of brioche slices with egg wash. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and spread each slice with about 2 Tbsp. walnut crème. Top with figs, cut sides up. Brush figs with butter and drizzle with honey.
Bake bostock until edges are golden brown and figs look softened and juicy, 20–25 minutes. Transfer baking sheet to a wire rack and let bostock cool.
Dust with powdered sugar just before serving.

filipino-chicken-adobo.name: Filipino Chicken Adobo

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar

ingredients.prep: green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal (for serving)

instructions: Place chicken, garlic, chiles, ginger, vinegar, soy sauce, peppercorns, palm sugar, and bay leaves in a large reasalable plastic bag or 13x9" baking dish; toss to combine. Chill, turning chicken once, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.

Heat oil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium. Add chicken, reserving marinade, and cook, turning occasionally and adjusting heat to medium-low if needed, until skin starts to brown and caramelize, 6–8 minutes. Add marinade and ½ cup water; bring to a simmer. Cover saucepan and cook 35 minutes. Uncover, turn chicken, and continue to simmer, turning chicken occasionally and adjusting heat if needed, until meat is very tender and liquid is reduced and starting to glaze, about 25 minutes.
Serve chicken over rice. Spoon sauce over, then top with scallions.

fireside-coffee.name: Fireside Coffee
instructions: Mix non-dairy creamer, instant coffee, sugar, hot chocolate mix, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl.
To use, mix 2 to 3 heaping tablespoons in a mug with hot water. Store remaining mixture in an airtight container.

fish-fillet-skewer-with-vegetables-argir.name: Fish Fillet Skewer With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 2 peppers red cut into frame (in eight)
2 peppers green cut into frame (in eye),
1 large onion cut into frame (in eight)
2 peppers red cut into frame (in eight)
2 peppers green cut into frame (in eye),
1 large onion cut into frame (in eight)

instructions: From the night before we put the meat for the souvlaki in a firewall.
Add the ground versions, yogurt and garlic.
Mix very well, cover and retrieve all night to marinate.
Clean the stems from the rosemary brunches and smooth them, leaving behind a fudice for extra aroma and appearance.
We cross the meat and vegetarians alternatively, making 10 full souvlakis.
Bake for 4-5 minutes on each side or in a grill, until the liquid comes out of the beat is clear.
Serve the skaters with Tabulet salad and, if we want, with our own homemade pies for a full and enjoyable meal.

fish-fillet-with-spinach-and-barley-argi.name: Fish Fillet With Spinach And Barley
fish-fillet-with-spinach-and-barley-argi.original_name: Φιλέτο ψαριού με σπανάκι και κριθαράκι

ingredients.item: 2 code fillets or fish of our choice
2 tabletspoon olive oil + a little extra for finishing
4 cup of water or hot water
2 code fillets or fish of our choice
2 tabletspoon olive oil + a little extra for finishing
4 cup of water or hot water

instructions: Cut each fish fillet in half and keep it in the refrigerator until coking.
Heat a shock pot over medium heat, add the olive oil and sauté the onion and leek for 5 minutes, to become transparent.
Add the barley, carrot and a few drops of olive oil. Bake for 1-2 minutes to heat the pasta.
Fill in warm broth or water and bottle for 3-4 minutes.
Add the spinach, Peas and dill and mix.
Touch the fish pieces into the intensives, sprinkle with some olive oil, salt and pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes to soften the pasta.
We check the liquids in the vehicle at interfaces, making sure the food does not dry – it must have a zoom.
Finally, add the lemon juice and shake the pot from the handles to go everywhere.
Allow the food to stand for 2-3 minutes out of heat and then equalise the dishes by sprinkled with a few drops of olive oil.
Serve while it is still warm and humor and accompany with lemon quarters.

fish-fillets-with-russian-salad-teleculi.name: Fish Fillets With Russian Salad
fish-fillets-with-russian-salad-teleculi.original_name: Filetes de pescada com salada russa
instructions: Dry the fillets thoroughly and season them with salt and 1/2 lemon juice. Beat the eggs with flour by adding water in thread, until you get a thick and consistent sprinkle.

Pass the fillets through the pot and fry them in warm, abundant oil. Drain the fillets on absorbent paper and then serve them, decorated with slices of the remaining lemon and accompanied with Russian salad.

For Russian salad, cook frozen vegetables in boiling water, seasoned with salt, then drain them very well and let them cool. If you prefer, choose fresh vegetables, such as carrots and potatoes, and cook them together with peas and/or green beans. Can season with olive oil and vinegar or with a little mayonnaise

fish-manchu-lezzet.name: Fish Manchu
instructions: 1. Onions are chopped.
2.  Tavaya oils are taken and onions are roasted in oil.
3.   Salt and red pepper are added to the onions starting to take color.
4. Fish are cleaned and divided into two-finger-width slices.
5.   fish are placed in the medicine and onions are added.
6. The water is added and the cover is closed.
7.   It is cooked and served for 5 minutes by adding vinegar and salt to fish.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

flank-steak-salad-with-chimichurri-dress.name: Flank Steak Salad With Chimichurri Dressing

ingredients.item: -ounce container marinated small fresh mozzarella balls

instructions: Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Combine parsley (with stems), oregano, and garlic in processor; blend 10 seconds. Add 1/2 cup oil, vinegar, and hot pepper sauce; blend until almost smooth. Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper.

Brush grill rack with oil. Sprinkle steak on both sides with salt and pepper. Grill steak to desired doneness, about 5 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer steak to work surface; let rest 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss greens in large bowl with some dressing. Transfer to large platter. Sprinkle mozzarella over.
Thinly slice steak across grain on slight diagonal. Arrange steak atop greens. Drizzle with remaining dressing.

florina-peppers-with-feta-cheese-argiro.name: Florina Peppers With Feta Cheese
instructions: Pick small peppers.
After washing them well, walk them without fluids.
Heat the olive oil and fry them whole until bubbles appeared on their skin.
Remove the pan from heat and remove the peppers with vintage.
Add the pan back to heat for 2-3 minutes while leaving the peppers to cool.
With a knife, cut and pull their skin and cut along in stripes.
Add the garlic and leave them for 2 minutes.
Then pour with this garaged olive vintage (not all) the peppers and sprinkle with the grated feta and finely chopped parsley.
Serve with toasted bread and have a wonderful appetizer.

flourless-chocolate-lava-cake.name: Flourless Chocolate Lava Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C) with oven rack in center position. Butter six 4-ounce ramekins.

Place chocolate and butter into a metal or glass bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water. Stir occasionally, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until melted. Remove from heat.

Combine eggs, sugar, and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment; beat at medium-high speed until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Reduce speed to low; add chocolate mixture and beat until combined. Divide batter among the prepared ramekins; place on a baking sheet.
Bake until edges are set but center is underdone, about 10 minutes. Cool before serving for 3 minutes.

flowering-chives-and-pork-slivers-jiu-ca.name: Flowering Chives And Pork Slivers (Ròu Sī)

ingredients.prep: such as canola or grapeseed oil

instructions: Mix together the Cornstarch, 1 ts.of the wine, I'm wild, and pish of Sugar in a medium bowl. Trim any excessive Fat or Skin from the pork and slide it against the ground into short, thin pieces, 1 to 2 Inches (2.5 to 5 cm) by ¼ inch (6 mm). Toss the pork with the marinade and let sit for at least 10 minutes but no more than 1 hour.
Cut the chives into 1- to 2-inch (2.5- to 5-cm) segments. You should have about 4 cups. Set aside.

Heat a well-seasoned wok over high until smoking. Reduce the heat to medium-high, then add the oil. Once the oil is shimmering, add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add the pork and stir-fry until just cooked, 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the floating hundreds, the remaining 2 tsp. of wine, 1 ½ tsp. Sugar, and the salt and cold until aromatic, 1 to 2 minutes. Don't get the kids for too long, or they lose their chryspness!

four-cheese-grilled-cheese-sandwich.name: Four-cheese Grilled Cheese Sandwich

ingredients.prep: cut lengthwise, or more to taste

instructions: Mix butter and garlic in a small bowl until well combined. Spread 1/2 of the butter onto one side of each slice of bread; set aside.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat; stir in spinach and giardiniera. Saute until spinach is wilted and mixture is heated through, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove to a bowl and wipe out the skillet.

Place 1 slice of bread, buttered-side down, into one side of the warm skillet. Heat 1/2 tablespoon oil in the other side of the skillet. Place mozzarella slices in the skillet and cook until soft, 1 to 2 minutes. Place mozzarella slices on top of the bread in the skillet. Repeat with the provolone, Asiago, and Fontina slices.

Add spinach mixture and tomato slices to the skillet, adding more oil if necessary, and cook until warm, 2 to 3 minutes. Place spinach mixture on top of the cheese, followed by the tomatoes and the remaining slice of bread, buttered-side up. Flip the sandwich and cook until browned and cheese has melted, 5 to 10 minutes.

french-bistro-salad.name: French Bistro Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk together white wine vinegar and mustard in a small bowl. Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking. Mix in garlic, salt, and pepper. Chill vinaigrette in the refrigerator until ready to toss with the salad greens.
Wash and thoroughly dry mixed salad greens. Place in a large, chilled salad bowl.
Stir dressing, and drizzle some of it on the greens and toss. Add enough dressing to coat the leaves, but not puddle in the bottom of the bowl.
Sprinkle fresh parsley, chives, and tarragon over the salad and serve immediately.

french-style-onion-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: French Style Onion Soup Recipe

4 slices of baget bread or toast bread

fresh-pasta-with-buttered-tomatoes.name: Fresh Pasta With Buttered Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: finely grated, plus more for serving

instructions: Using a fork, mix 2⅓ cups semolina flour and ⅔ cup just-boiled water in a medium bowl until flour is moistened and looks pebbly. (Mixture may look dry, but it will hydrate fully as it rests. If large patches of dry flour remain, though, you can add up to 1 Tbsp. additional water.) Knead dough in bowl until a smooth, cohesive dough forms, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a resealable plastic bag and close, pressing out all of the air. Let dough rest at room temperature 1–4 hours.

Divide dough into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece of dough and keeping remaining dough sealed in bag, roll out on a surface (no need to flour) into a long, narrow 1/16"-thick rectangle. Dust lightly with semolina flour (this will prevent sticking); starting at shorter end, fold sheet into thirds (do not to press too firmly; you want to keep dough from sticking to itself). Cut into ¾"-wide ribbons with a sharp knife. Gently unfurl pasta ribbons and transfer to a lightly floured rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining 3 pieces of dough.

Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes; cook, stirring often, until garlic is pale golden and fragrant, about 2 minutes. Mix in 1 pint Sun Gold or cherry tomatoes, halved, a big pinch of kosher salt, and ¼ cup water. Cover, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes burst and become saucy, 6–8 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook fresh pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until barely tender, about 1 minute.

Using tongs, transfer pasta to pot with tomato sauce. Add 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, 1 tsp. colatura (anchovy sauce) or fish sauce, remaining 1 pint Sun Gold or cherry tomatoes, halved, 2 oz. finely grated Parmesan, and 2 Tbsp. torn basil. Using tongs or a wooden spoon, cook, stirring and adding a few tablespoonfuls of pasta cooking liquid if needed, until pasta is coated and glossy, about 2 minutes. Season with salt.

Divide pasta among shallow bowls and top with more finely grated Parmesan and remaining 2 Tbsp. torn basil.
Do ahead: Pasta dough can be made 1 day ahead. Keep covered and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

fresh-pea-and-mint-soup.name: Fresh Pea And Mint Soup

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh peas (from about 5 pounds peas in pods) or two 16-ounce bags frozen petite peas
Chopped fresh mint plus additional for garnish

instructions: Heat oil in heavy large pot over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic. Sauté until tender, about 7 minutes. Add peas and stir 1 minute. Add 51/2 cups broth and bring to simmer. Cook until peas are very tender, about 8 minutes. Cool 15 minutes. Puree soup and 1/4 cup chopped mint in batches in blender until smooth. Return to same pot; thin with more broth by 1/4 cupfuls, if desired. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cool, cover, and chill.
Rewarm soup over medium-low heat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Ladle into bowls; garnish with additional mint.

A bottle of bubbly is the perfect way to begin this special meal. It's also a great pairing for the soup. We like the crisp acidity and long finish of the Champagne Henriot NV Brut Souverain ($35, France).

fried-cabbage-with-bacon-and-garlic.name: Fried Cabbage With Bacon And Garlic
instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until browned and crispy, 7 to 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and remove most of the bacon grease from the skillet.

Add oil to the skillet and heat over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until the onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes. Add cabbage, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes; cook and stir until cabbage is tender, 10 to 15 minutes. If you prefer softer cabbage, cover the skillet while cooking to give it some steam.
Crumble bacon into the skillet and mix with the cabbage until well combined.
